basic_details.job_title: NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute Of Technology Sikkim (NIT Sikkim)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology (NIT) Sikkim has released recruitment advertisements (NITS/Rect/Fac/2026/01-03) dated April 8, 2026, for various faculty positions including Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor.

important_dates.raw: Closing Date for Hard Copy Receipt: May 22, 2026, by 5:00 PM. Eligibility Determination Date: May 22, 2026. Queries Email: [email protected]. Office Mobile: +91-7479013180 (9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on working days).

application_fee.details: Fees must be paid online only via the gateway provided on the institute website. | UR / OBC / EWS: ₹1500. Women / SC / ST / PwD: ₹750.

qualification.details: Educational qualifications and experience are governed by Schedule 'E' of the NIT Statute. | Engineering Disciplines: Ph.D. in a relevant discipline with a First Class in preceding degrees (B.Tech/B.E. and M.Tech/M.E.). Direct Ph.D. holders after B.E./B.Tech are eligible if they obtained First Class at the Bachelor's level. Basic Sciences: Ph.D. in a relevant discipline with a First Class in preceding degrees (B.Sc. and M.Sc.). In-breeding Clause: Candidates who obtained their Ph.D. from NIT Sikkim will not be considered unless there is a 3-year gap between the Ph.D. award and the application deadline.

vacancy_details.Departments: Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, Mechanical, Maths

selection_process: Scrutiny and shortlisting based on credit point scores and academic/research performance. A written test and/or presentation. A final personal interview before the Selection Committee. Note: Candidates must appear in person; no TA/DA will be provided.
how_to_apply: Candidates must submit their applications in hard copy while also filling out an online "Candidate Summary".
Online Summary: Fill out the summary on the NIT Sikkim website.
Hard Copy Submission: Download and type the application form (Part A and B).
Enclosures: Include self-attested copies of educational qualifications, experience, category certificates, credit point claims, and the payment receipt.
Mailing Address: Send the sealed envelope to: The Director, National Institute of Technology Sikkim, Ravangla, District - Namchi, Sikkim, PIN - 737139 (India).
Envelope Labeling: Super-scribe the envelope with "APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF [NAME] IN THE DEPARTMENT OF [NAME]".

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: NIT Sikkim has announced a total of 30 faculty vacancies for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor posts across multiple departments.

faq.question: Q2. How should the application envelope be labeled for NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: The envelope must be super‑scribed with “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF [POST NAME] IN THE DEPARTMENT OF [DEPARTMENT NAME]” and addressed to The Director, NIT Sikkim, Ravangla, District Namchi, Sikkim – 737139.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: The application start date is 08 April 2026, the last date to apply is 22 may 2026, and the last date for receipt of hard copy in the institute is 22 May 2026 up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are advertised under NITS/Rect/Fac/2026/01-03?
faq.answer: Ans: The advertisement covers Assistant Professor (Grade II/Grade I), Associate Professor, and Professor positions in Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, Mechanical, and Mathematics (for Associate Professor only).

faq.question: Q5. What is the Eligibility Criteria required NIT Sikkim faculty posts?
faq.answer: Ans: Candidates must have a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline with First Class in preceding degrees; B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech for Engineering, and B.Sc and M.Sc for Basic Sciences, as per NIT Statutes (Schedule ‘E’).

faq.question: Q6. Is a candidate with a Ph.D. from NIT Sikkim eligible to apply?
faq.answer: Ans: Yes, but only if there is at least a 3‑year gap between the date of award of Ph.D. from NIT Sikkim and the application deadline, due to the in‑breeding clause.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: The application fee is ₹1500 for UR/OBC/EWS candidates and ₹750 for Women, SC, ST, and PwD candidates, payable online only through the payment gateway on the institute website.

faq.question: Q8. What are the pay levels for the different NIT Sikkim faculty posts?
faq.answer: Ans: Assistant Professor (Gr‑II/Gr‑I) is in Level 10/Level 12, Associate Professor is in Level 13A2, and Professor is in Level 14A of the 7th CPC pay matrix.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for NIT Sikkim Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ans: Selection includes scrutiny and shortlisting based on credit points and academic/research performance, followed by written test and/or presentation, and a final interview before the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q10. How should candidates submit their applications for NIT Sikkim faculty posts?
faq.answer: Ans: Candidates must fill an online “Candidate Summary” on the NIT Sikkim website, then send a typed hard copy of the application (Part A & B) with self‑attested documents and fee receipt to the Director, NIT Sikkim, by speed/registered post or courier.
